message:
feat(trace): implement streaming replay for large traces [bd-z454]

Add StreamingReplayer that processes traces with O(1) memory by reading
events directly from files without loading all events into memory.

Key features:
- StreamingReplayer: Works directly with TraceReader for O(1) memory
- ReplayProgress: Track progress through large traces (percent, remaining)
- ReplayCheckpoint: Save/restore replay position for very long traces
- Checkpoint validation: Ensures checkpoints match trace file via hash
- Step/Run/Breakpoint modes: Same API as in-memory TraceReplayer
- run_with callback: Process events without accumulating in memory

The existing TraceWriter/TraceReader already support streaming I/O.
This completes the streaming replay infrastructure for handling traces
with millions of events that wouldn't fit in memory.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
